description_long: This object is a rectangular solar energy installation featuring a large array of photovoltaic panels mounted on a raised platform. The main section consists of two distinct groups of solar panels, one larger and one smaller, both tilted at an angle to maximize sunlight exposure. The panels are supported by a robust, dark-colored frame that appears to be constructed from metal, likely steel or aluminum, and is set atop a broad, flat base that could be concrete or another heavy material. The installation is surrounded by a low perimeter wall, creating a contained area that may serve as a maintenance or operational zone. The surface within the perimeter is flat and open, with a few small structures or equipment boxes visible, possibly for electrical control or monitoring. The overall design suggests a fixed, ground-mounted solar array suitable for urban or industrial environments.
description: A rectangular, ground-mounted solar energy installation with two tilted arrays of photovoltaic panels on a raised, walled platform. The structure features a robust metal frame and a flat base, with small equipment boxes inside the perimeter.
description_view_0: From this view, the full length of the installation is visible, showing both the large and small solar panel arrays and the surrounding low wall.
description_view_1: This angled view highlights the tilt of the solar panels and the depth of the platform, with the panels' surfaces clearly visible.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the open, flat area within the perimeter and the back sides of the panel mounts, with less emphasis on the panels themselves.
description_view_3: This side angle shows the staggered arrangement of the two panel groups and the supporting structure beneath them.
attribute_panel_orientation: Panels are tilted at approximately 30 degrees, orientation appears fixed, azimuth direction not clearly specified.
attribute_mounting_structure_type: ground-mounted with a metal (likely steel or aluminum) frame and perimeter wall.
attribute_array_configuration: Two groups of panels: one larger array and one smaller, both arranged in single rows parallel to each other.
